name: Displays correct product information on the Product Detail Page (PDP)
fullName: cypress/e2e/ui_automation/02_products.ui.cy.js#Products | Product listing and detail pages Displays correct product information on the Product Detail Page (PDP)
description: Validates that the Product Detail Page shows accurate product information such as name, description, price, and image.
descriptionHtml: Validates that the Product Detail Page shows accurate product information such as name, description, price, and image.

parameters.name: Yielded
parameters.value: <input class="input_error form_input" placeholder="Username" type="text" data-test="username" id="user-name" name="user-name" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="none" value="standard_user">

parameters.name: Yielded
parameters.value: <input class="input_error form_input" placeholder="Password" type="password" data-test="password" id="password" name="password" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="none" value="secret_sauce">

parameters.name: Yielded
parameters.value: <input type="submit" class="submit-button btn_action" data-test="login-button" id="login-button" name="login-button" value="Login">

parameters.name: Applied To
parameters.value: <input type="submit" class="submit-button btn_action" data-test="login-button" id="login-button" name="login-button" value="Login">

testStage.description: Validates that the Product Detail Page shows accurate product information such as name, description, price, and image.

steps.name: step 1. OPEN THE PRODUCT DETAIL PAGE FOR "SAUCE LABS BACKPACK"
step 2. VALIDATE THAT THE PRODUCT NAME, DESCRIPTION, AND PRICE ARE CORRECT
assert expected Sauce Labs Backpack to equal Sauce Labs Backpack

parameters.name: Yielded
parameters.value: carry.allTheThings() with the sleek, streamlined Sly Pack that melds uncompromising style with unequaled laptop and tablet prote...

steps.name: assert expected carry.allTheThings() with the sleek, streamlined Sly Pack that melds uncompromising style with unequaled laptop and tablet protection. to equal carry.allTheThings() with the sleek, streamlined Sly Pack that melds uncompromising style with unequaled laptop and tablet protection.

parameters.value: carry.allTheThings() with the sleek, streamlined Sly Pack that melds uncompromising style with unequaled laptop and tablet prote...

parameters.name: expected
parameters.value: carry.allTheThings() with the sleek, streamlined Sly Pack that melds uncompromising style with unequaled laptop and tablet prote...

steps.name: step 3. NAVIGATE BACK TO THE PRODUCT LISTING PAGE

parameters.name: Yielded
parameters.value: <button class="btn btn_secondary back btn_large inventory_details_back_button" data-test="back-to-products" id="back-to-products" name="back-to-products">...</button>

parameters.name: Applied To
parameters.value: <button class="btn btn_secondary back btn_large inventory_details_back_button" data-test="back-to-products" id="back-to-products" name="back-to-products">...</button>
